events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Multi-talented singer, actress, and dancer Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's Legacy
angles.copy: From Fly Girl to global superstar, Jennifer Lopez has been dominating stages and screens for decades. What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Did video really kill the radio star, or did it just give us more ways to enjoy the tunes?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your stand-out track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music lives on forever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The indomitable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still fronting The Pretenders with that unmistakable voice and attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51 (UK single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine 51 Years
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Global James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day marks the 1962 premiere of 'Dr. No', the first film in the iconic 007 franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. Which Bond actor or theme tune is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true icon of British comedy.
